vocab.meaning: hiệu suất nhận thức đỉnh cao
vocab.example: I find that I reach my peak cognitive performance in the early hours, making it the ideal time for complex problem-solving.
My circadian rhythm is naturally aligned with the morning, so I feel much more alert before noon than in the later part of the day.

vocab.meaning: sự minh mẫn về trí tuệ
vocab.example: The stillness of the morning provides a level of mental clarity that is often disrupted by the hustle and bustle of the afternoon.

vocab.meaning: sự uể oải sau khi ăn trưa
vocab.example: I tend to avoid tackling difficult subjects in the afternoon due to the inevitable post-lunch slump that drains my energy.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: Studying at dawn allows for hours of uninterrupted focus before the deluge of emails and notifications begins.
My intellectual stamina is at its highest in the morning, whereas by the afternoon, I find my concentration starts to wane.

vocab.meaning: có lợi cho/tạo điều kiện cho
vocab.example: The bright, natural light of the morning is far more conducive to intensive reading than the fading light of late afternoon.

vocab.meaning: khả năng ghi nhớ thông tin
vocab.example: I've noticed that my retention of information is significantly better when I study right after a good night's sleep.
I struggle with a sense of sluggishness in the afternoon, which makes it hard to absorb new and challenging concepts.

vocab.meaning: thời điểm vàng/thời điểm tốt nhất
vocab.example: For me, the morning is prime time for academic work, as my brain feels fresh and ready to tackle any obstacle.
